wins: NIKE Running up over 20% for the quarter
Nike Mind platform sold out globally
Strong sell-through for Air Max 95 reintroduction
Positive growth in all channels in North America for the first time in 2 years
Confidence in returning to balanced growth in North America
risks: Promotional activity continues to impact gross margins
Greater China revenue decline of approximately 20%
Inventory levels remain elevated in EMEA
Marketplace management actions continue to create near-term pressure
